creator: jb.1234abcd@gmail.com
text:
# portmaster /usr/ports/textproc/libexttextcat
..
===>  libexttextcat-3.3.1 conflicts with installed package(s): 
      libtextcat-2.2_4

      They install files into the same place.
      You may want to stop build with Ctrl + C.
#
# ls /var/db/pkg/libtextcat-2.2_4/

Note: no ref in /usr/ports/UPDATING.

# pkg_delete: file '/usr/local/bin/createfp' doesn't exist
pkg_delete: couldn't entirely delete package `libtextcat-2.2_4'
(perhaps the packing list is incorrectly specified?)
#

Note: pkg deleted.

# portmaster /usr/ports/textproc/libexttextcat
..
===>>> Installation of textproc/libexttextcat (libexttextcat-3.3.1) complete
#

How-To-Repeat: as above
